    nlinarith
  
  -- Key Lemma: (3x + 1)(ab + bc + ca) + 9x + 3 ≥ 4x(a + b + c) + 3abc
  have h_main : (3 * x + 1) * (a * b + b * c + c * a) + 9 * x + 3 ≥ 4 * x * (a + b + c) + 3 * a * b * c := by
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ a * b * c := by positivity
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ a * b + b * c + c * a := by
      nlinarith [mul_nonneg ha hb, mul_nonneg hb hc, mul_nonneg hc ha]
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ x * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by nlinarith
    -- Use nlinarith to combine all inequalities and prove the main result
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
      mul_nonneg ha hb, mul_nonneg hb hc, mul_nonneg hc ha,
      mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (a - b)) hc, mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (b - c)) ha,
      mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (c - a)) hb, mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (a - b)) (mul_nonneg ha hb),
      mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (b - c)) (mul_nonneg hb hc), mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (c - a)) (mul_nonneg hc ha)]
  
  -- Apply the key lemma to complete the proof
  linarith
